prestazioni: VK56VD 5.6L V8 engine: Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (stroke increased to 102mm), JE 2618-T6 forged pistons (11.5:1 compression), and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for 7,000 RPM redline capability. Paired with a custom billet camshaft from Brian Crower (280°/284° duration, 0.550" lift) and Ferrea titanium intake/exhaust valves with upgraded valve springs and retainers.

Forced induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (1.06 A/R turbine housings) with custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipes, Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates, and a PTP 4-inch intercooler core with custom end tanks for 18 psi of boost, targeting 850whp on E85. Supporting fuel system includes dual Walbro 450 LPH pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can system.

Drivetrain and handling: Full Nissan Titan 6-speed automatic transmission reinforcement with a Level 10 torque converter, Sonnax billet valve body, and a PML deep transmission pan. Chassis upgrades include KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with adjustable camber plates, SuperPro poly bushings (full kit), and a Cusco 22mm rear sway bar. Braking system features Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers with 405mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a StopTech stainless steel brake line kit.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (QX80-specific) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts, finished in a matte PPF-wrapped Nissan 'Midnight Opal' with gloss black accents. Includes a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated LED turn signals and a carbon fiber rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust cutouts for the Tomei Ti titanium exhaust system.

Rocket Bunny V3 aero overhaul featuring a carbon fiber GT wing (1,800mm width, 300mm height) with adjustable angle mounts, custom carbon fiber side mirrors (replicating the Nissan R35 GT-R design), and a full carbon fiber hood with a functional heat extractor and custom LED halo daytime running lights. Interior visual mods include a full Alcantara headliner, custom Recaro CS-E II front seats with INFINITI embroidery, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub.

Wheel setup: Rotiform LAS-R 24x12.5" (front) and 24x13.5" (rear) forged wheels with a custom concave design, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (295/30/24 front, 325/25/24 rear). Wheel spacers are custom 50mm adapters with extended wheel studs, and the setup includes a H&R lowering kit (35mm drop) with custom spring rates for aggressive stance while maintaining ride quality.
